assertionResults.reason: The expected product detail callback target /products/cmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a currently resolves to a Product not found page after login, so the rerun could not verify whether guest sell intent resumes into a create-listing destination.

steps.action: Open the app home page at mobile viewport 375x812
Open the callback target detail route /products/cmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a
steps.expected: Product detail page with sell CTA is available for the rerun target
steps.observed: Route rendered Product not found with no sell CTA.

steps.action: Open /login?callbackUrl=%2Fproducts%2Fcmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a%3Faction%3Dforsale and sign in as test@example.com
steps.expected: After login the app returns to a valid sell/listing destination for the same detail route
steps.observed: Login succeeded and redirected to /products/cmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a, but that route still rendered Product not found.

evidence.network: Observed redirect to /login?callbackUrl=%2Fproducts%2Fcmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a%3Faction%3Dforsale followed by post-login navigation to /products/cmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a; no useful network requests were captured by agent-browser during the rerun.

assertionResults.issues: Blocking test data drift: the previously referenced product id now returns Product not found, so the assertion cannot be validated on the live surface in this rerun.

frictions.description: The prior synthesis referenced a product id that no longer resolves in the current shared app/database state.
agent-browser network logging did not retain useful request details for this redirect sequence during the rerun.

blockers.description: The assigned callback target route /products/cmn75io4y0006l0atloup346a is no longer a valid product detail page, preventing verification of the sell-resume destination after authentication.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried the route directly before and after login using the provided callbackUrl; both attempts rendered Product not found.

evidenceSummary: Captured mobile screenshots of the guest home page, the missing product route, the login redirect with preserved callbackUrl, and the post-login landing page showing the same missing product state.
summary: VAL-CROSS-008 is blocked on rerun because the previously targeted product detail route now returns Product not found, so the live app could not demonstrate whether guest sell intent resumes into a create-listing destination after login.
notes: Viewport used: 375x812 as required for marketplace/detail/login flow.
No code or shared data was modified during validation.
